    Description
    DictionaryBuilder
    Manages the dictionary operations and file parsing.

    Full functional test suite for DictionaryBuilder.

    DictionaryEntryNotFoundException
    short exception class for in case of a word not being found in a dictionary
    DictionaryShell
    Provides a command line interface for interacting with the DictionaryBuilder.
    GenericLinkedList<T extends Comparable<T>>
    A doubly linked list implementation specialized for hash table separate chaining.
    GUIDriver
    Project 4 Swing Application (GUI) Mirrors the CLI driver (add / remove|delete / search / list / quit).
    HashTable<T extends Comparable<T>>
    A hash table implementation using chaining with GenericLinkedLists.
